description: 'not sure what it is, something at my investment property' — vague, agent must ask clarifying questions before assigning service
caller_turns: Hi, I've got an investment property and there's apparently something wrong with the plumbing but I'm not sure what
The tenant rang me and said there's an issue but couldn't tell me exactly what — it's at 88 Pyrmont Bridge Road, Pyrmont. I'm Ivan Petrov, 0466 800 900
I can't get down there today — can someone call me back after they've had a look or can I just leave my details for now?

slots.notes: investment property plumbing issue — nature unknown, tenant reported problem, owner requesting callback

policy_expectations: When service type cannot be determined, agent must capture details as a lead for callback
Agent should not guess or assign an incorrect service type
Must capture job address (investment property) and owner's contact details
forbidden_actions: Assign a specific service type without clarification from caller
Fail to capture address of the job site
Book an appointment without knowing what the job entails
